# Copilot Instructions

- Project: Guru's Sweets & Snacks premium landing page.
- Stack: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, GSAP, hls.js, react-router-dom.
- Entry point: src/main.tsx wraps App in StrictMode and BrowserRouter.
- Styling: Tailwind v4 is configured in src/index.css and vite.config.ts uses @tailwindcss/vite.
- Assets: the custom Dirtyline font must live in public/Dirtyline-36daysoftype-2022.woff2.
- Keep changes focused on the hero landing page and preserve the black background with white typography.
